name_en: Top-tier replica M45943-4419 Antique Steel Small Flower✨ M45960 Antique Steel Trim. Every detail of this Petite Malle handbag draws from Louis Vuitton's trunk-making heritage: the bag's silhouette, iconic Monogram canvas, metal lock and hardware – plus the classic printed calfskin lining. Finished with smooth calfskin trim, this exquisite and charming "mini trunk" is a companion from day to night. Can be carried as a clutch or worn crossbody with an adjustable strap. Detailed Features 20 x 12.5 x 6 cm (Length x Height x Width)
